title: verbascum pseudocreticum subsp. demnatense
intro: Verbascum pseudocreticum subsp. demnatense, also known as Moroccan mullein, is a biennial plant belonging to the snapdragon family. Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory compounds. The health benefits of Moroccan mullein include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve skin health, and provide antioxidant properties. Herbal preparations of Moroccan mullein often involve infusions or decoctions of the leaves and flowers, which can be used to make teas, tinctures, or topical creams.
